title: astragalus chartostegius
intro: Astragalus chartostegius, also known as the Chinese milkvetch or Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of plant that belongs to the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its numerous medicinal properties. Astragalus chartostegius is valued for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which enable it to help regulate the body's stress response, boost the immune system, and improve overall health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used to alleviate symptoms of fatigue, insomnia, and respiratory issues.
